title: deviceEnrollmentType
description: Possible ways of adding a mobile device to management.

values.description: Default value, enrollment type was not collected.
values.name: unknown

values.description: User driven enrollment through BYOD channel.
values.name: userEnrollment

values.description: User enrollment with a device enrollment manager account.
values.name: deviceEnrollmentManager

values.description: Apple bulk enrollment with user challenge. (DEP, Apple Configurator)
values.name: appleBulkWithUser

values.description: Apple bulk enrollment without user challenge. (DEP, Apple Configurator, Mobile Config)
values.name: appleBulkWithoutUser

values.description: Windows 10 Bulk enrollment through ICD with certificate.
values.name: windowsBulkUserless

values.description: Windows 10 bulk Entra ID (Azure AD) Join.
values.name: windowsBulkAzureDomainJoin

values.description: Windows 10 Co-Management triggered by AutoPilot or Group Policy.
values.name: windowsCoManagement

values.description: Windows 10 Entra ID (Azure AD) Join using Device Auth.
values.name: windowsAzureADJoinUsingDeviceAuth

values.description: Indicates the device is enrolled via Apple User Enrollment with Company Portal. It results in an enrollment with a new partition for managed apps and data and which supports a limited set of management capabilities
values.name: appleUserEnrollment

values.description: Indicates the device is enrolled via Apple User Enrollment with Company Portal using a device enrollment manager user. It results in an enrollment with a new partition for managed apps and data and which supports a limited set of management capabilities
values.name: appleUserEnrollmentWithServiceAccount

values.description: Evolvable enumeration sentinel value. Do not use.
values.name: unknownFutureValue
